title: Live Coverage: Will MongoDB Beat Earnings After the Bell
text: Live market analysis covered MongoDB's Q4 fiscal 2026 earnings report released after market close on March 2, 2026. The company reported earnings per share of $1.65, exceeding analyst expectations of $0.92 by a significant 79.35% margin. Revenue performance was strong with Q4 2026 total revenue of $695.1 million, up 27% year-over-year. Full year fiscal 2026 total revenue reached $2.46 billion, up 23% year-over-year. Despite exceeding earnings expectations, MongoDB's stock experienced a sharp 22.24% decline following the earnings announcement. The primary driver of the selloff was disappointing forward guidance for fiscal 2027, which fell short of investor expectations and signaled potential growth moderation. FY2027 guidance of $2.86-$2.90 billion in revenue represents 16-18% growth, significantly lower than the 23% growth achieved in FY2026. This guidance reset and subsequent stock decline illustrate how forward outlooks can overshadow strong quarterly results in market reactions.
